infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Hassle uses your calendar so you can add tasks you reschedule to the day you move them to.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Hassle uses your calendar so you can add tasks you reschedule to the day you move them to.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsWriteOnlyAccessUsageDescripti: Hassle adds tasks you reschedule to your calendar.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: Hassle can add gentle reminders to your Reminders app if you turn that on.
infoPlist.NSRemindersFullAccessUsageDescription: Hassle can add gentle reminders to your Reminders app if you turn that on.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Hassle only uses the camera if you choose to add a photo.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Hassle only uses the microphone if you choose to record something.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Hassle only uses your contacts if you choose to share with someone.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Hassle only uses your location if you turn on a location-based feature.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Hassle only opens your photos if you choose to add an image.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Hassle only saves to your photos if you choose to.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Hassle can use Face ID to keep your entries private, if you enable it.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Hassle only uses motion data if you turn on a related feature.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Hassle only uses speech recognition if you choose to.
